introductionBio: I am a Software Engineer with a strong background in Full-Stack development, specializing in Backend Architecture and system scalability. I am passionate about modernizing legacy systems and designing solutions that drive operational efficiency.
bio:
I am a Software Engineer specializing in Full-Stack development and System Architecture, with solid experience since 2017 developing scalable, high-performance solutions for the oil & gas and logistics sectors.
I have advanced expertise in Java (Spring Boot), JavaScript/TypeScript (Node, React), and SQL. My experience includes modernizing legacy systems and designing microservices architectures, leveraging technologies like Docker, Kubernetes, and PostgreSQL to build robust and efficient environments.

children.title: Mid-level Software Engineer
children.description:
CoDaF (Framework & Database): Spearheaded the optimization of a centralized data persistence framework, eliminating redundancy and establishing a standardized foundation of 100+ entities to drive cross-project consistency and operational efficiency.

Atria (ML & Cost Reduction): Technically led a real-time Machine Learning pilot for antenna monitoring, enabling proactive fault detection that significantly reduced maintenance costs and improved system integrity.

License Manager & Rig State: Architected access control solutions to protect intellectual property and conducted reverse engineering on critical undocumented applications, unblocking team agility and ensuring strategic alignment with management.

children.title: Junior Software Engineer
children.description:
Sequence Builder + Cost Tracker: Engineered a simulation system for oil well planning that optimized resource allocation through precise time and cost estimates. By enabling 'planned vs. actual' data analysis, the solution drove continuous process improvements and significant operational cost reductions.

Dynamic Risk Advisor (DRA): Contributed to a real-time operational risk management tool that empowered critical decision-making by monitoring safety barriers and alerts. This system directly enhanced operational safety and efficiency through proactive risk mitigation.

children.title: Trainee Software Engineer
children.description:
Campaign Planner: Maintained and enhanced a mission-critical application for oil and gas campaign management, ensuring system stability and seamless execution of complex operational plans.

PDF Extractor (OCR Automation): Engineered an OCR-based automation script that eliminated manual data entry, accelerating the delivery of structured data for Machine Learning models and unlocking new business opportunities.

experience.title: Grupo Fratelli
experience.description: Multi-Warehouse Solution: Architectured and delivered an end-to-end warehouse and financial management system that synchronized inventory with fiscal operations. This integration eliminated data silos, significantly boosting operational efficiency and enabling data-driven strategic decision-making.

certification.name: Communication: How to express yourself effectively and be understood
